title: Golden Syrup Gyro
description: A cozy Greek dish featuring a crispy golden gyro with the sweetness of golden syrup, perfect for adding a unique twist to your meals.
instructions: Mix minced garlic with olive oil and a pinch of paprika in a bowl. Marinate the chicken or turkey meat for at least 30 minutes.
Cook the rotini pasta as per package instructions, until al dente.
Heat olive oil in a frying pan over medium heat. Add the marinated meat and cook for about 8-10 minutes on each side.
Drain the cooked pasta and mix it with the golden syrup and garlic marinade from the chicken or turkey. Stir well to coat evenly.
Place the gyro slices (cooked meat) in a serving dish, topped with the golden syrup mixture. Serve hot.
